# Basis

NAD+ Supplement for Cellular Aging

per
pouch

BEST DEAL

Couldn't load pickup availability

## Description

Target aging at the source—your cells. Increase your NAD+ levels with Basis for healthy aging, to boost cellular energy, and maintain healthy DNA. Developed by Elysium chief scientist and renowned aging researcher Leonard Guarente, Ph.D. Increase and sustain NAD+ levels by 40% to:

* Promote healthy aging, feel good for your age
* Promote cellular energy and reduce general tiredness and fatigue
* Fight aging at the cellular level and protect your DNA from stressors
* Support collagen and ceramide synthesis for healthy skin
* Support healthy muscle function

## Ingredients

Basis contains two powerful ingredients to combat cellular aging:

* **Nicotinamide Riboside Chloride (NR)**  
  NR is a naturally occurring form of vitamin B3 and a highly efficient precursor to NAD+—the raw material that the body uses to make NAD+ via a two-step process. This precursor has been shown to preferentially elevate NAD+ compared to nicotinic acid and nicotinamide, also called niacin.
* **Pterostilbene (PT)**  
  A powerful polyphenol naturally produced by plants to protect against internal and external stress. The potent combination of NR and pterostilbene in Basis is designed to increase NAD+ levels and counter the decrease in the activity of sirtuins, which occurs with normal aging.
* Vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, nut-free, and contains no artificial colors or flavors.
* NSF Certified for Sport, the only independent third-party certification program recognized by the United States Anti-Doping Agency (USADA). Please confirm the certification of each lot [here](https://www.nsfsport.com/certified-products/search-results.php?keyword=elysium+health).
* See [nutrition label](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/pages/basis-supplement-facts) for more information.
* The quality and purity information of every lot is [available here](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/pages/basis-lot-info).

## Recommended Use

* Take two capsules in the morning, with or without food.
* Each pouch contains a 30-day supply.
* This product is only intended for healthy adults. Do not take if you are pregnant or nursing. Consult with your physician before using.

[View full details](/products/basis)

## NAD+ Levels and Healthy Aging go Hand-in-Hand

Research published in *Nature Aging* “suggests that a clear association exists between NAD+ and health status in human aging.” NAD+ (nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide) is found in every cell in your body. It is essential to the chemistry that keeps you up and running.

Unfortunately, NAD+ levels decline universally as we age.

## How can you increase your NAD+ levels? Basis is the evidence-based choice

We now have a way to safely and sustainably boost NAD+ levels. Developed by Dr. Leonard Guarente, a leader in the field of aging research, Basis was clinically proven to increase NAD+ levels by an average of 40% in a double-blind, randomized, placebo-controlled clinical trial published in the peer-reviewed journal [*Nature Partner Journals: Aging and Mechanisms of Disease*](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41514-017-0016-9).

Boosted NAD+ activates sirtuins, supports cellular energy and metabolism, targets cellular aging to promote a healthy cellular aging process, and helps maintain healthy DNA.

[See the science](/pages/science-behind-basis)

> ## “I believe Basis is a product that can improve cellular health and target, at least, some of the deficits incurred by aging. It is an important part of a strategy that I follow, along with exercise and a healthy diet, to maintain an active life as I enter my seventies, and hopefully much longer.”

**Leonard Guarente, Ph.D.,**Elysium Co-founder and Chief Scientist

## Why is Basis unique among NAD+ supplements?

Basis is clinically proven to safely and sustainably increase NAD+ by an average of 40% in humans. Elysium’s toxicology study also confirmed the superiority of the NR-E in Basis when compared to the published safety profiles of other NAD+ supplements, underscoring the company’s rigorous commitment to research and quality.

The synergistic combination of Elysium’s proprietary and high-purity nicotinamide riboside (NR-E) with potent antioxidant pterostilbene (PT) makes Basis extraordinarily effective. Basis is also third-party tested by independent labs both during and after manufacture for purity and quality, and is independently verified as NSF Certified for Sport.

## Basis Journey

## Hour 4

You just took Basis—nothing could be happening yet, right? Actually, the nicotinamide riboside is already making big moves. It enters your cells via equilibrative nucleoside transporters, membrane proteins that shuttle molecules across.

\*Individual results may vary. This timeline may differ from the typical purchaser’s experience and is not intended to represent or guarantee that anyone will receive the same or similar results.

## Day 01

NAD+ levels are already on the rise at the cellular level. You can expect support for increased cellular energy, improved mitochondrial function, housekeeping for your proteome and genome, and cellular protection from everyday stressors (for example, oxidative stress). Not bad for a day’s work.

## Day 14

NAD+ levels continue to rise in your cells and throughout your body. Keep doing what you’re doing while Basis works in the background.

## Day 30

Now results are really adding up. If you had all the gear for NAD+ analysis from whole-blood lysate, you could see for yourself. ([Instead, you can read our **scientific paper**.](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41514-017-0016-9)) Your cellular NAD+ levels are now 40% higher than they were on day one, and that’s where they’ll stay if you keep taking Basis. Where is all this NAD+ going? Studies suggest that NR supplementation increases NAD+ and affects NAD+-related metabolites in multiple tissues at 30 days—including your muscle and brain.

## Day 60

You’ve logged 30 days of elevated and sustained NAD+ levels in your cells and tissues. That’s a big deal because 330 billion cells turn over each day. Colon epithelial cells, for example, turn over in 3-5 days while the upper layer of the skin, or the epidermis, takes roughly 39 days to regenerate. NAD+ can help with supporting these processes and tissue health. In your skin, more NAD+ can support the process of synthesizing ceramide and collagen. Our first human clinical trial on Basis also showed preliminary evidence for supporting liver health and results from our latest, 6-month, human clinical study (published in *Hepatology*) confirmed these initial findings in healthy adults with non-alcoholic fatty liver.

## Day 180

A lot happens in six months. What’s changed in your life? With Basis, it’s all starting to add up—to systemic health benefits. Basis is supporting multiple tissues and systems, in a sustained manner. For example, one study showed that six months of increased NAD+ levels reduced transepidermal water loss—a measure of overall skin health and barrier function.

## Day 365

Congratulations on your first year. NAD+ declines by as much as 50% every 20 years, according to research. But human studies are beginning to show an association between NAD+ abundance and healthy aging status. Keep taking Basis to counteract the age-related decline of NAD+ and to build on a year’s worth of benefits. Just like with exercise, sleep, and diet—consistency is key.

## Basis 101: The Science

[### What is NAD+ and Why Is it Important?

NAD+ is essential to the creation of energy in the body and the regulation of pivotal cellular processes. Here’s why it’s so important, h...](/blogs/science101/what-is-nad-and-why-is-it-important)

[### What Is Nicotinamide Riboside?

This form of Vitamin B could be the key to restoring NAD+ levels — here’s why.](/blogs/science101/what-is-nicotinamide-riboside)

[### What is Pterostilbene?

A cousin to resveratrol but more potent—pterostilbene is found in certain berries and nuts and serves as a powerful antioxidant.](/blogs/science101/what-is-pterostilbene)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Why are sirtuins important for aging?

Sirtuins are a family of proteins that regulate cellular health. Sirtuins play a key role in regulating cellular homeostasis. Homeostasis involves keeping the cell in balance. However, sirtuins can only function in the presence of NAD+, nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide, a coenzyme found in all living cells.

### What is Nicotinamide Adenine Dinucleotide (NAD+) and why is it important?

NAD+, or nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide, is a critical coenzyme found in every cell in your body, and it’s involved in hundreds of metabolic processes — but NAD+ levels decline with age. NAD+ has two general sets of reactions in the human body: Helping turn nutrients into cellular energy as a key player in metabolism and working as a helper molecule for proteins that regulate other cellular functions. These processes are incredibly important.

### What is Nicotinamide Riboside (NR) and why is it important?

This form of Vitamin B could be the key to increasing NAD+ levels — here’s why. Nicotinamide riboside is often called NR for short, and it’s a precursor to NAD+, meaning it's the raw material from which your body makes NAD+ through a series of chemical transformations. Human clinical studies, including ours, have shown efficacy of NR supplementation in increasing NAD+ levels.

### What is Pterostilbene and why is it important?

Pterostilbene is a polyphenol, a type of molecule that occurs in plants, particularly small berries and nuts. Blueberries are a particularly rich source of pterostilbene; although it is found in grapes, pterostilbene (unlike its cousin resveratrol) doesn’t survive the wine-making process.

### What’s a polyphenol?

“Phenol” refers to a certain chemical structure (in this case, a hydroxyl group linked to a benzene ring); “poly” just means the molecules have more than one of the structure. One of polyphenols’ main jobs is to help the plant fight off pathogens. When eaten by humans, polyphenols may serve as powerful antioxidants.

### Is there anything I should notice once I start taking Basis?

Basis is designed to work beneath the surface, so its primary purpose is not to deliver surface-level results. Taking Basis is an investment in the long-term health of your cells, and you may not feel different despite the improvements happening inside your body. Everyone’s physiology is unique and results vary from person to person.

### What are the results of your clinical trial?

Elysium conducted a first-in-humans study demonstrating clearly that Basis can increase and sustain cellular NAD+ levels. Participants in the trial experienced a 40% average increase in cellular NAD+ levels within a month, which was maintained for the duration of the trial. We also tested a variety of biological markers to add to the existing body of evidence confirming that the ingredients in Basis are safe.

### How do subscriptions work?

Our prepaid subscription plans are our most cost-effective options. When you select a prepaid annual plan, the pricing offers savings to customers who commit to a long-term subscription. Prepaid subscriptions are considered final sale, so if you cancel in the middle of a prepaid plan, you will continue to receive the remaining shipments, and the cancellation will take effect at the end of your plan before renewal. Our monthly subscriptions are $50/month and can be canceled at any time prior to your next shipment. You can also place a single-purchase order without a subscription by selecting “Individual Purchase” on the checkout page. Please contact our Customer Experience Team at care@elysiumhealth.com if you need to talk about your plan.

### Where do you ship?

Vision, Index, and the Senolytic Complex are currently only available to ship and bill to addresses located in the U.S. Mosaic, Basis, Signal, Matter, and Format are available in the United States and Canada. Sign up for our newsletter [here](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/newsletter/sign-up) to be notified of updates related to the international availability of our products.

### When will I receive my product?

From the time an order ships, our free standard shipping delivers in 5-7 business days. For an additional $25 fee, expedited shipping arrives in 2-3 business days. Please allow 1-2 business days to process your order.

## Description

Youthful skin (plus, hair, nails, bones, and joints) requires collagen and NAD+. Unfortunately, both decline starting in our 20s. **Cofactor** by Elysium Health is an advanced 4-in-1 collagen system that combines: **collagen peptides**, **nicotinamide riboside (NR)**, a precursor that’s clinically proven to boost NAD+, **hyaluronic acid**, and **vitamin C**.

* **Collagen peptides (grass fed)** to stimulate and provide the building blocks for collagen production**\***
* **NAD+ booster NR** to promote cellular youth for optimal collagen production**\***
* **Hyaluronic Acid** to improve skin elasticity, hydration, and barrier function**\***
* **Vitamin C** to support collagen production**\***
* **Reduce fine lines and wrinkles**\*
* **Bone, joint, hair, and nail support**\*

## Ingredients

Cofactor is the advanced 4-in-1 collagen system that combines:

* **20 g collagen peptides** from grass-fed bovine
* **250 mg nicotinamide riboside chloride (NR)**,aclinically proven NAD+ booster.
* **120 mg hyaluronic acid (HA)**
* **90 mg vitamin C**
* Cofactor is gluten-free, dairy-free, soy-free, sugar-free, non-GMO, and contains no artificial flavors or colors.
* See [nutrition label](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/pages/cofactor-supplement-facts) for more information.
* The quality and purity information of every lot is [available here](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/pages/cofactor-lot-info).

## Recommended Use

* Combine 1 scoop with 8 fl oz of liquid and mix thoroughly. Scoop included.
* Each pouch contains 28 daily servings.
* This product is intended for healthy adults. If pregnant or nursing, consult with your physician before using.
* See [Cofactor Recipes](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/pages/cofactor-recipes "Cofactor Recipes") for delicious, Elysium-approved ways to take Cofactor.

[View full details](/products/cofactor)

## Collagen production requires youthful cells

NAD+ is a critical coenzyme found in every cell in your body that helps keep cells youthful and functioning optimally. As we age, our NAD+ levels naturally decline. In skin, NAD+ levels decline by almost 60% between young adulthood and middle age, impacting collagen production—by age 40, we’ve lost about 25% of our collagen.

**Cofactor** provides an advanced 4-in-1 collagen system that combines: **collagen peptides**, which provide the stimulus and the building blocks for collagen; **nicotinamide riboside**, a clinically proven NAD+ booster, to help improve the health and function of the cells that use these building blocks to produce collagen; **hyaluronic acid** to improve skin hydration and elasticity; and **vitamin C**, an essential cofactor for collagen synthesis.

## Better skin, hair, nails—and more

Human clinical studies demonstrate that supplementation with collagen peptides significantly increases skin elasticity and dermal density (a reflection of the amount of structural components like collagen and elastin in the dermis) and improves wrinkles, skin roughness, and cellulite scores. Collagen peptides have also been shown to support healthy hair and nail growth. Hyaluronic acid, another key ingredient in Cofactor, has been clinically proven to increase skin moisture levels, boost elasticity, and improve skin barrier function.

[See the science](/pages/the-science-behind-cofactor-a-4-in-1-collagen-support-system)

## Supercharge your collagen system by combining Cofactor with Mosaic

Elysium’s skin aging and collagen support supplement, [Mosaic](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/collections/skin-longevity-bundle "https://www.elysiumhealth.com/collections/skin-longevity-bundle"), fights oxidative stress from sun exposure and aging—the main culprit in collagen loss. Combine Cofactor with Mosaic to supercharge your collagen system by protecting the collagen you’re replacing with Cofactor.

## Bone and joint benefits for healthy mobility

As the most abundant protein throughout our bodies, collagen is the primary building block for the body’s connective tissues, such as bones, tendons, ligaments, and cartilage, playing a key role in supporting our strength, flexibility, and movement. Human clinical studies show that oral supplementation with collagen peptides improves markers of bone health, including bone mineral density (in postmenopausal women), and supports joint mobility and comfort.

## Cofactor 101: The Science

[### Here's what happens when you take Cofactor, starting at 3 weeks.

Explore the benefits of Elysium’s advanced collagen support system, Cofactor, from three weeks to one year and beyond.](/blogs/aging101/cofactor-benefits-timeline)

[### What happens to collagen with age?

Collagen keeps your skin resilient, plump, and youthful. Learn why it changes with age and what you can do to slow its decline.](/blogs/aging101/collagen-and-skin-aging)

[### Cofactor in the kitchen: serious science, simple recipes

Looking for delicious ways to incorporate Cofactor in your daily routine? Here are some of the Elysium team’s favorite ways to take Cofac...](/pages/cofactor-recipes)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Cofactor and what does it do?

Cofactor is an advanced 4-in-1 collagen support system that combines: collagen peptides, which provide the stimulus and the building blocks for collagen; nicotinamide riboside, a clinically proven NAD+ booster, to help improve the health and function of the cells that use these building blocks to produce collagen; hyaluronic acid to improve skin hydration and elasticity; and vitamin C, essential for collagen synthesis.

### Why does Cofactor contain nicotinamide riboside?

Youthful skin requires collagen and NAD+, which both decline starting in our 20s. NAD+ decline—a hallmark feature of aging, is associated with a decline in cellular health and function, resulting in reduced collagen production. Cofactor uniquely combines collagen peptides with nicotinamide riboside (NR), a precursor that’s clinically proven to boost NAD+, to create an optimal environment for sustained collagen production.

### What does hyaluronic acid do?

Hyaluronic acid (HA) is a major component of the skin and plays a critical role in maintaining skin hydration. As we age, our skin produces less HA, contributing to decreased hydration, plumpness, and impaired barrier function. Clinical studies show that oral supplementation with HA increases whole-body skin moisture content throughout the layers of the skin, improves skin barrier function, and increases skin elasticity.

### When should I expect to see benefits?

While individual results may vary, clinical studies suggest benefits starting around 3 weeks with increased skin hydration. Improvements in skin elasticity have been demonstrated at 2 months and a reduction in wrinkles and improvements in skin texture by 4 months. Hair and nail benefits have been reported at 6 months. This timeline may differ from the typical user’s experience and is not intended to represent or guarantee that every user will achieve the same or similar results.

### How does Cofactor taste?

Cofactor is unflavored with minimal taste and aftertaste.

### How do I take Cofactor?

We recommend dissolving Cofactor in liquids (like smoothies, protein shakes, juices, coffee or tea, or water) and foods (like yogurt, or overnight oats). Unlike conventional collagen supplements, Cofactor contains nicotinamide riboside, which is sensitive to prolonged exposure to high temperatures. Therefore, Cofactor dissolved in hot beverages should be consumed within 30 minutes. One serving a day is all you need.

### Can I combine Cofactor with Basis or Signal?

Yes, you can combine Cofactor with Basis and/or Signal. Cofactor, Basis, and Signal each contain 250 mg of an NAD+ precursor. Clinical studies have demonstrated that daily supplementation with up to 2,000 mg of nicotinamide riboside (the NAD+ precursor in Cofactor and Basis) or 1,000 mg of nicotinamide mononucleotide (the NAD+ precursor in Signal) in healthy individuals is safe and well tolerated. Taking Basis and/or Signal can help support additional cellular processes not provided by ingredients in Cofactor—Basis contains pterostilbene (a SIRT1 activator) to support DNA maintenance, while Signal contains the SIRT3 Activation Complex, which supports mitochondrial health.

### How do subscriptions work?

Our prepaid subscription plans are our most cost-effective options. When you select a prepaid annual plan, the pricing offers savings to customers who commit to a long-term subscription. Prepaid subscriptions are considered final sale, so if you cancel in the middle of a prepaid plan, you will continue to receive the remaining pouches, and the cancellation will take effect at the end of your plan before renewal. Our monthly subscriptions are $62/month and can be canceled at any time prior to your next shipment. You can also place a single-purchase order by selecting “Individual Purchase” on the checkout page for $75. Please contact our Customer Experience Team at care@elysiumhealth.com if you need to talk about your plan.

### Where do you ship?

Cofactor, Vision, Index, and the Senolytic Complex are currently only available to ship and bill to addresses located in the U.S. Mosaic, Basis, Signal, Matter, and Format are available in the United States and Canada. Sign up for our newsletter [here](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/newsletter/sign-up) to be notified of updates related to the international availability of our products.

From the time an order ships, our free standard shipping delivers in 5-7 business days. For an additional $25 fee, expedited shipping arrives in 2-3 business days. Please allow 1-2 business days to process your order.

## Description

There is growing evidence that an aging immune system plays a key role in the overall aging process—impacting organs and systems throughout the body. **Format** is the first and only immune product that combines foundational daily immunity ingredients, Elysium’s Inflammaging Complex, and Elysium’s Senolytic Complex to address both the root causes and the downstream effects of an aging immune system.

* Supports a healthy immune system
* Protects healthy immune cells from free radicals and oxidative stress
* Targets age-related inflammation (“inflammaging”)
* Helps the body clear pro-inflammatory senescent cells
* Supports joint health and comfort
* Targets two related hallmarks of aging, inflammaging and cell senescence

## Ingredients

Format uniquely combines daily and monthly supplement systems to provide comprehensive immune support with targeted delivery.

**Daily Immune Supplement**

* **Foundational immunity ingredients**: Vitamin C, selenium, and zinc protect immune cells from damaging free radicals and oxidative stress to support and maintain a healthy immune system. Format provides 100% of your daily vitamin C.
* **Inflammaging Complex**: Combines a patented blend of tamarind and turmeric extracts with broccoli extract (a sulforaphane source), ingredients that are proven to promote a healthy inflammatory status.

**Twice-Monthly Senolytic Complex**

* **Senolytic Complex:** Contains proven senolytics, quercetin (*Sophora japonica*), fisetin (*Rhus succedanea*), extracts of Chinese ginseng (Panax notoginseng), and chestnut rose (*Rosa roxburghii*) to help the body clear senescent cells.

* Gluten-free, nut-free, lactose-free, and contains no artificial flavors or colors.
* NSF Certified for Sport, the only independent third-party certification program recognized by the United States Anti-Doping Agency (USADA). Please confirm the certification of each lot of both the daily immune supplement and the intermittent senolytic complex [here](https://www.nsfsport.com/certified-products/search-results.php?keyword=elysium+health).
* See [nutrition label](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/pages/format-supplement-facts) for more information.
* The quality and purity information of every lot is [available here](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/pages/format-lot-info).

## Recommended Use

* **Daily Immune Supplement:** Take two capsules daily, with or without food.
* **Twice-Monthly Senolytic Complex:** Take four capsules on two consecutive days each month, with or without food.
* Each Format shipment contains a 30-day supply of the daily immune supplement, 60 capsules; and a 30-day supply of the Senolytic Complex, 8 capsules.
* This product is intended for healthy adults. If pregnant or nursing, consult with your physician before using.

 [View full details](/products/format)

## How the aging immune system impacts your health and longevity

As we age, the balance of immune cells shift toward pro-inflammatory cell types, including senescent immune cells that cease to replicate and secrete inflammatory molecules, contributing to a phenomenon known as “inflammaging.” Inflammaging is one of the 12 hallmarks of aging.

Format is the first and only formulation for immune aging that combines a daily immune supplement that provides foundational immunity ingredients and Elysium’s Inflammaging Complex with Elysium’s intermittent Senolytic Complex. Format addresses both the root causes *and* the downstream effects of an aging immune system.

## Combat inflammaging—a hallmark of aging

Inflammaging involves elevated inflammatory markers like IL-6, CRP, and TNF-ɑ. Format’s patented tamarind-turmeric blend in the **Inflammaging Complex** has been clinically proven to reduce these markers in individuals with joint conditions and support joint health and comfort. The Complex also includes broccoli extract (a sulforaphane source), which further supports a healthy inflammatory status.

[See the science](/pages/science-behind-format)

> Format is unique in combining a daily immunomodulatory cocktail with intermittent, proven senolytic compounds to clear senescent cells—not available in any other health supplement.

**Leonard Guarente, Ph.D.,** Elysium Co-founder and Chief Scientist

## Target inflammaging at its source with senolytics

Based on cutting-edge research in cell senescence, the **Senolytic Complex** is proven to clear pro-inflammatory senescent cells in human cell lines. It contains potent senolytics that target senescent cells, boost muscle recovery and endurance, and support cellular rejuvenation. Taken monthly, this “hit-and-run” approach aids in reducing the body’s burden of senescent cells.

## Format 101: The Science

[### The connection between senescence and inflammaging

Cell senescence is one of the major causes of inflammaging. Learn more about how we can manage age-related inflammation.](/blogs/aging101/senescence-and-inflammaging)

[### What are senolytics?

Senolytics target aging at the cellular level by helping the body clear senescent cells that accumulate with age. Learn more about these ...](/blogs/aging101/what-are-senolytics)

[### Did you know you have two types of immune systems?

The immune system consists of two main components—the innate and adaptive immune systems. Learn about our immune system and how it change...](/blogs/science101/two-types-of-immune-systems)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Format and what does it do?

**Format** is the first and only immune product that combines foundational daily immunity ingredients, Elysium’s Inflammaging Complex, and Elysium’s Senolytic Complex to address both the root causes *and* the downstream effects of an aging immune system.

### What is Elysium’s Inflammaging Complex?

Our aging immune system is a key contributor to inflammaging, an age-related inflammation and a hallmark of aging. Elysium’s Inflammaging Complex combines a patented blend of tamarind and turmeric extracts with broccoli extract (a sulforaphane source), ingredients that are proven to promote a healthy inflammatory status.

### What is Elysium’s Senolytic Complex?

Elysium’s Senolytic Complex contains proven senolytics, quercetin (*Sophora japonica*), fisetin (*Rhus succedanea*), extracts of Chinese ginseng (Panax notoginseng), and chestnut rose (*Rosa roxburghii*) to help the body clear senescent cells, a major source of inflammaging. Taken monthly, this “hit-and-run” approach aids in reducing the body’s burden of senescent cells.

### Why and how has the Format formulation changed?

As part of Elysium’s ongoing commitment to provide the best products based on longevity research, we’ve enhanced the **Format** formulation to deliver a comprehensive solution for immune aging, which targets both the root causes and downstream effects of an aging immune system. The enhanced formulation incorporates Elysium’s new Inflammaging Complex to leverage the latest advances in scientific research pointing to the importance of inflammaging in aging. The Inflammaging Complex targets the downstream effects of inflammaging with a patented tamarind-turmeric blend, which is clinically proven to reduce markers of inflammaging in individuals with joint conditions and support joint health and comfort.

### How do subscriptions work?

Our prepaid subscription plans are our most cost-effective options. When you select a prepaid annual plan, the pricing offers savings to customers who commit to a long-term subscription. Prepaid subscriptions are considered final sale, so if you cancel in the middle of a prepaid plan, you will continue to receive the remaining shipments, and the cancellation will take effect at the end of your plan before renewal. Our monthly subscriptions are $50/month and can be canceled at any time prior to your next shipment. You can also place a single-purchase order without a subscription by selecting “Individual Purchase” on the checkout page. Please contact our Customer Experience Team at care@elysiumhealth.com if you need to talk about your plan.

### Where do you ship?

Vision, Index, and the Senolytic Complex are currently only available to ship and bill to addresses located in the U.S. Mosaic, Basis, Signal, Matter, and Format are available in the United States and Canada. Sign up for our newsletter [here](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/newsletter/sign-up) to be notified of updates related to the international availability of our products.

### When will I receive my product?

From the time an order ships, our free standard shipping delivers in 5-7 business days. For an additional $25 fee, expedited shipping arrives in 2-3 business days. Please allow 1-2 business days to process your order.

# Index

Couldn't load pickup availability

## Description

Aging isn’t *one* thing. Index, a revolutionary at-home biological age test developed by Elysium Health, now measures **10 different aspects of aging** using the latest generation technology in the science of epigenetics. With Index you'll receive:

* **Biological age**: the age your body is expected to perform or function.
* **Cumulative rate of aging**: the pace at which your body has been aging.
* **System age scores**: the biological age of nine different systems, including brain, heart, metabolic, and immune, for deeper insights into how you’ve been aging.
* **Science-backed recommendations**: evidence-based lifestyle recommendations you can use to adopt healthier habits.
* **Longevity research**: participate directly in research with the Aging Research Center by Elysium Health.

## Technology

With the superior precision of our Algorithmic Platform for Epigenetic Examination (APEX), Elysium calculates your biological age and system ages by examining sites on your DNA where methylation has taken place. DNA methylation is an epigenetic modification that influences how genes are expressed and their genome-wide pattern changes predictably with age.

We employ the custom Elysium chip, developed with the help of biotechnology leader Illumina, to analyze your methylation patterns via a computational approach that significantly improves upon past biological clocks.

* **The most precise epigenetic biological age test**  
  Precision and reliability are significant challenges for measuring biological age at the individual level. To develop the most precise and reliable test, Elysium partnered with Morgan Levine, Ph.D., of Yale University—a leading epigenetics researcher. Index leverages a unique machine learning solution demonstrated in [*Nature Aging*](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC9586209/) to be the most precise and reliable among published epigenetic age measures.
* **A better predictor of physical functioning status**   
  Index is more predictive of physical functioning status than prior leading measures. This means biological age as measured by Index corresponds closely with how your body is expected to perform and is a more accurate predictor of how quickly you’ve been aging.
* **Deeper insights into how your body has been aging**  
  Each of the nine system measures is based on DNA methylation signatures present in your genome that reflect a number of biomarkers relevant to that particular system. Biomarkers were chosen for how closely they are associated with aging and their ability to indicate overall long-term health and wellness. Elysium is the first to offer this level of insight.
* **Better ability to track lifestyle changes over time**  
  Motivated to make changes to your lifestyle and track the impact on your rate of aging? You need to eliminate noise over time. Repeatability and better prediction of physical functioning status add up to a better ability to track the impact of your lifestyle changes on your biological age and system age scores.

## What to expect

Approximately six weeks after receiving your saliva sample, we’ll send an email letting you know your results are ready. Before that, a lot happens behind the scenes.

* **Week 1 to 2: DNA Extraction**  
  We extract your DNA and use a process called bisulfite conversion to distinguish methylated from unmethylated DNA across your genome.
* **Week 3: Methylation Profiling**  
  The bisulfite-converted DNA gets loaded onto the Elysium chip and scanned to create your methylation profile. Quality control ensures your data is robust and complete.
* **Week 4 to 5: Calculating Biological Age and System Age Scores**  
  With the superior precision of APEX, we analyze methylated sites across your genome to calculate your biological age and system age scores.
* **Week 6+: Tracking Your Progress**  
   Use your report results and recommendations to see if making healthy changes can impact how you age.

[View full details](/products/index)

## System Ages: The Latest Evolution of Index

Understand your body like never before with new system age scores.

System ages reflect the biological ages of nine systems: brain, heart, metabolic, immune, inflammation, kidney, liver, hormone, and blood. Track these over time to understand how each system contributes to your overall long-term health and wellness.

## Do You Know How Fast You’ve Been Aging?

Unlike chronological age, which tells you the number of years you’ve been alive, biological age reflects the age your body (or system) is expected to perform or function. Using your saliva sample, Index analyzes methylation patterns across your genome. DNA methylation is an epigenetic modification that influences how genes are expressed and their genome-wide pattern changes predictably with age.

[See the science](/pages/science-behind-index)

> ### “Index shows incredible promise when it comes to monitoring how the body is capable of functioning and there is potential for even more diverse applications in the future…The more measures to capture specific processes, the more we can actually understand what's unique for an individual.”

**Morgan Levine, Ph.D.**, of Yale University

## From Epigenetic Insights to Action

It turns out that everyone ages at a different rate. Knowing your unique cumulative rate of aging gives you actionable insight you can start using today. How? Studies have found associations between lifestyle factors—diet, exercise habits, alcohol consumption, and stressors like sleepless nights—and biological age.

Index offers more than 100 science-based lifestyle recommendations drawn from this research.

## Participate Directly in Longevity Research

Introducing the Aging Research Center: a digitally-native, collaborative, and longitudinal research effort developed by Elysium Health. Our first study, TIME-A, aims to advance our understanding of the connections between epigenetics, lifestyle, demographics, and health and aging. Index users are welcome to enroll for free.

[Learn more](/pages/arc)

## Index 101: The Science

[### What Is Your Biological Age? And Why Does It Matter?

How fast have you been aging? Let us explain.](/blogs/science101/what-is-your-biological-age-and-why-does-it-matter)

[### System Ages: A Deeper Understanding of How You’ve Been Aging

System ages represent the biological age of individual systems–including brain, heart, metabolic, and immune–and provide a snapshot of th...](/blogs/aging101/system-ages)

[### Epigenetics, DNA Methylation, And The Science Of Biological Clocks

Our DNA makes us who we are, but it’s epigenetics that brings our story to life. Here’s the science of epigenetics, including how it work...](/blogs/aging101/epigenetics-dna-methylation-and-the-science-of-biological-clocks)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Index?

Index was developed in partnership with Morgan Levine, Ph.D., of Yale University to provide the most precise biological age test. Harnessing the latest generation technology in the science of epigenetics, Index analyzes your epigenome to accurately determine your overall biological age—a measure of the age your body is expected to perform or function—your cumulative rate of aging, and biological ages for nine systems, including brain, heart, metabolic, and immune (these are known as system ages or system age scores). With its superior precision, Index is designed to help you better understand your personal aging process.

### What kind of test is Index?

Index is an at-home saliva test. Saliva contains a mixture of cells (immune and epithelial) and is a reliable, non-invasive source of high-quality genomic DNA that can provide insights into both your biological age and cumulative rate of aging. Elysium extracts the DNA from the cells in your saliva sample for DNA methylation profiling. Saliva collection is non-invasive, convenient, and poses minimal discomfort or risk, unlike needle-based blood collection methods.

### Who can use Index?

This methodology has been examined on individuals age 0-100, but we recommend it for adults.

### What are system ages?

System ages represent the biological age of nine systems–brain, liver, metabolic, immune system, heart, hormone, kidney, inflammation, and blood–and provide a snapshot of their relative contribution to your overall long-term health and wellness. Each system measure is based on DNA methylation ([epigenetic modifications](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/epigenetics-dna-methylation-and-the-science-of-biological-clocks)) signatures present in your genome that reflect a number of biomarkers relevant to that particular system. Biomarkers were chosen for how closely they are associated with aging and their relationship to overall long-term health and wellness. Elysium is pleased to be the first company to offer this level of insight.

### I took an Index test a few years ago, will I receive updated results that include my system ages, or will I have to take a new test?

If you took Index before February 15, 2023, we’ve retroactively analyzed your data and added system age scores to your report(s). You can access this by logging into your account[here](https://my.elysiumhealth.com/). If you have trouble viewing your system ages in your report, please reach out to our customer experience team at[care@elysiumhealth.com](mailto:care@elysiumhealth.com).

### Is Index FDA approved?

Index has not been reviewed or approved by the FDA as it is not a medical device. Index is not intended to screen, diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or condition or assess risk of any disease or condition. Unless advised by your healthcare professional, biological age should not be used to determine or alter any chronological age-related health or medical treatments.

### How is my personal information protected?

Your data is protected with industry-standard encryption while being transmitted to Elysium and in storage. We have implemented strict access controls internally, including limiting access to a select group of employees and maintaining an audit trail of any access.

### Can I see a sample report?

Yes. Please contact our customer care team at[care@elysiumhealth.com](mailto:care@elysiumhealth.com.).

### What is the Aging Research Center by Elysium Health?

The [Aging Research Center](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/arc) is a digitally-native, collaborative, and longitudinal research effort developed by Elysium Health to better our collective understanding of aging by building the world’s most actionable epigenetic dataset, with an emphasis on translation, comprehensiveness, and diversity.

## Your Brain Shrinks as You Age

As you age, your brain, including the gray matter in it, shrinks—this is true even if you’re healthy. Gray matter controls many of the “active” things you do every day: learning and memory, motor control, balance, and coordination.

When your gray matter shrinks as part of normal aging, those functions can be significantly affected. Over your lifetime, you can lose up to 20% of your brain volume.

## Matter Slows Brain Atrophy

What causes this brain loss? Research has shown that having lots of the amino acid homocysteine in the blood is correlated with brain atrophy in healthy older adults.

The good news? Homocysteine levels respond to the availability of B vitamins. **This is where Matter comes in**. To unlock the benefits of B vitamins for brain health, Matter contains a tri-vitamin complex that was developed with Oxford and is clinically proven and patented to slow the brain volume loss that happens as we age. Doctors and world-renowned researchers recommend Matter for long-term brain health.

[See the Oxford study](/pages/science-behind-matter)

> ### “The results were more strikingly positive than we could have dreamt.”

**A. David Smith**, Professor Emeritus of Pharmacology at the University of Oxford, Founding Director of OPTIMA, and Elysium Scientific Advisory Board member.

## Our Ingredients and Quality

Matter is a breakthrough in consumer health and contains: A tri-vitamin complex developed with Oxford clinically proven to slow brain atrophy, a next-generation, EPA and DHA omega-3 in powder form that is 4x more readily absorbed than standard fish oils, and a special antioxidant: bilberry anthocyanins.

Harnessing the Oxford findings, each element in Matter’s formulation was selected for performance and quality, and specially dosed for efficacy. Matter is third-party tested by independent labs both during and after manufacture for purity and quality, and is independently verified as NSF Certified for Sport.

## Matter 101: The Science

[### Your Complete Guide to Omega-3s

You’ve probably heard that omega-3s are important for your health, but do you know why? Discover how they’re different from other fats, a...](/blogs/science101/your-complete-guide-to-omega-3s)

[### Why You Should Pay Attention to Your Homocysteine Levels

This important amino acid has been attracting attention in the science community for its role in overall health.](/blogs/science101/why-you-should-pay-attention-to-your-homocysteine-levels)

[### How To Pick A Good Omega-3 Supplement

Omega-3s are extremely important for health. They also happen to be one of the two essential fatty acids that aren’t made by the body, an...](/blogs/science101/how-to-pick-a-good-omega-3-supplement)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Matter and what does it do?

Matter contains a specific B-vitamin complex that is patented to slow age-related brain atrophy associated with mild memory concerns in combination with omega-3 free fatty acids and a bilberry extract that is rich in plant-based antioxidants called anthocyanins. This specially-calibrated formulation of ingredients is designed to support long-term brain health and was developed in partnership with the University of Oxford.

### Can Matter replace my daily fish oil/omega-3 product?

Yes. Matter contains 550 mg of an omega-3 lysine complex per dose (2 tablets). Of this 550mg, 250mg is EPA+DHA in free fatty acid form. Matter can be taken in place of your current fish oil/omega-3 product.

### Why does Matter contain such a high percentage of the daily values of vitamins B12, B6, and folic acid?

Matter contains the exact doses of vitamin B6, folic acid, and vitamin B12 that were shown to be efficacious at slowing age-related brain atrophy associated with mild memory concerns in the VITACOG study.

### How do I know that Matter is working? How long does it take to notice improvements?

Matter is designed to support long-term brain health with a specific combination of B-vitamins (B6, folic acid and B12) that was shown in a clinical study to slow age-related brain atrophy associated with mild memory concerns, omega-3s, and a bilberry extract that is rich in plant-based antioxidants called anthocyanins. All of these ingredients have been shown, through a combination of epidemiological research and clinical trials, to support brain function.The B-vitamin complex plays an important role in maintaining normal metabolism of the amino acid homocysteine. High homocysteine levels are associated with advanced age and have been shown to correlate with the rate of brain atrophy in healthy adults. In the University of Oxford's VITACOG study, two-year supplementation with the B-vitamin complex was shown to effectively lower homocysteine levels and slow age-related brain atrophy in 168 older people with mild memory concerns. Other studies of shorter duration have indicated that the effect of B vitamin supplementation on homocysteine levels occurs in the order of a few months.

### Is there any human data available on Matter? Has it been published?

Matter contains a B-vitamin complex that was clinically proven to effectively slow the rate of age-related brain atrophy associated with mild memory concerns in a clinical study conducted at the University of Oxford. This study was called 'VITACOG'. There have been several published papers on the outcomes of this study that can be found here: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/20838622/

Senescent cells secrete pro-inflammatory molecules that can trigger neighboring healthy cells to age faster—like a moldy piece of fruit. As we age, our ability to clear senescent cells declines, and preclinical studies suggest that their accumulation contributes to accelerated aging. Elysium’s Senolytic Complex is based on leading institutional research in the field of cellular senescence and contains senolytic compounds **proven to clear human senescent cells** to:

Whether your goal is healthy aging, managing age-related inflammation, or supporting an active lifestyle, Elysium’s Senolytic Complex enables you to easily personalize your senolytic protocol.

* **Healthy aging:**For healthy aging and general wellness, we recommend 2 doses per month: 4 capsules per day for 2 consecutive days at the beginning of each month.

* The healthy aging protocol includes 2 daily doses (2 sachets or 8 capsules) per month (delivered in a dark green box).

## What is cellular senescence?

Everyone has senescent cells, and they are present throughout our body, including in the skin, brain, muscles, and heart. Everyday stressors, including poor diet, lack of sleep, psychological stress, and sun and environmental exposure, can trigger cells to become senescent. Normally, senescent cells are cleared within days to weeks by our immune cells. As we age, however, senescent cells accumulate—accumulating exponentially faster after 60—and impede immune function, creating a snowball effect that leads to even more senescent cells. As they build up in our body and persist, senescent cells can induce “inflammaging”, a type of inflammation associated with aging, and alter the microenvironment of the tissue and its function.

## Proven to clear senescent human cells

Elysium’s Senolytic Complex is based on leading institutional research in the field of cellular senescence and has been demonstrated to clear senescent cells in two different human cell lines in laboratory studies. The formulation contains fisetin and quercetin, two extensively researched flavonoids found in fruits and vegetables with potent senolytic activity. The Complex also includes powerful compounds derived from Chinese ginseng and chestnut rose extracts, which have been shown in human clinical trials to accelerate senescent cell clearance, improve recovery and endurance, and support muscle remodeling and cellular rejuvenation after strenuous exercise.

Senolytic compounds, which specifically clear senescent cells, have shown great promise for health benefits preclinically, leading to many ongoing human trials.”

**Leonard Guarente, Ph.D.,**Elysium Co-founder and Chief Scientist

Combining senolytics, which clear senescent cells, with NAD+ boosters like Basis or Signal, which promote cellular health, delivers a one-two punch to promote cellular youth and decrease the burden of pro-inflammatory cells.

## Description

Power up the powerhouse of your cells. Signal is designed to target metabolic aging by protecting mitochondria—where the energy in your cells is made. Increase NAD+ with the precursor NMN to support energy production and activate SIRT3, a key mitochondrial enzyme, to protect and generate new mitochondria and help your cells adapt to daily metabolic changes as you age.

* Increase levels of the critical coenzyme NAD+ by 40% via the highly efficient precursor NMN
* Activate sirtuin 3 (SIRT3) to protect and generate new mitochondria to support cellular metabolism and energy
* Help maintain healthy insulin sensitivity in muscle—essential to maintaining blood sugar levels
* Support vascular health—critical for your athletic endurance
* Support brown fat thermogenesis, a cellular process which converts sugar and fat into heat to help maintain body temperature and support a healthy metabolism
* Reduce general tiredness and fatigue, support healthy muscle function, and feel good for your age

## Ingredients

Signal contains two ingredients that work synergistically to support metabolic health:

* **Nicotinamide Mononucleotide, NMN (250mg)**  
  NMN is a highly efficient precursor of the coenzyme nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide (NAD+), which is central to creating cellular energy and performing other key metabolic functions.
* **SIRT3 Activation Complex (150mg)**  
  Supports healthy mitochondrial function through a combination of honokiol (isolated from the bark of *Magnolia officinalis*), and viniferin (derived from grapevines). Both honokiol and viniferin are potent activators of SIRT3, a metabolic enzyme found in the mitochondria that helps preserve existing as well as generate new mitochondria.
* Vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, nut-free, and contains no artificial colors or flavors.
* NSF Certified for Sport, the only independent third-party certification program recognized by the United States Anti-Doping Agency (USADA). Please confirm the certification of each lot [here](https://www.nsfsport.com/certified-products/search-results.php?keyword=elysium+health).

## Recommended Use

* Take two capsules every morning, with or without food.
* Each pouch contains a 30-day supply.
* This product is only intended for healthy adults. Do not take if you are pregnant or nursing. Consult with your physician before using.

[View full details](/products/signal)

## Your Metabolism Ages Too

Metabolism converts food into the energy you need for life. As you age, your metabolism slows and becomes less efficient—impacting how quickly and effectively your cells function.

This happens for two main reasons: First, levels of a coenzyme called NAD+, which is central to hundreds of metabolic processes and cellular energy production, decline. Second, enzymes inside our mitochondria—the powerhouses of our cells—like SIRT3 that depend on NAD+ to function slow down.

## How to Target Metabolic Aging in Your Cells

Signal restores the age-related decline in NAD+ levels with NMN, one of the most efficient precursors of NAD+. A human clinical study demonstrated that 30 days of NMN supplementation at 250mg/day resulted in a 40% increase in NAD+ levels in the blood. NMN supplementation has been shown to support insulin sensitivity, vascular health (critical for athletic endurance), and muscle function.

[See the science](/pages/science-behind-signal)

> ### “Signal is a novel, mitochondria-centric product formulated to counter aging-dependent declines in metabolism by promoting youthful energetics and metabolic efficiency.”

**Leonard Guarente, Ph.D.,** Elysium founder, chief scientist, and renowned aging researcher and professor

## Activating SIRT3 to Support Mitochondrial Health

What happens inside your mitochondria is crucial. All your metabolic processes take place here, from energy production and synthesis of cellular building blocks to waste management. The mitochondrial protein SIRT3 drives many of these reactions, as well as protects and generates new mitochondria. The natural ingredients in Signal’s SIRT3 Activation Complex, honokiol and viniferin, are designed to work with NMN to activate SIRT3 to promote mitochondrial health and synthesis, which in turn support metabolic health.

## Signal 101: The Science

[### What is nicotinamide mononucleotide (NMN)?

NMN is a safe and efficient precursor to NAD+, the essential coenzyme and key metabolite found in every cell of the human body, and invol...](/blogs/aging101/what-is-nicotinamide-mononucleotide-nmn)

[### NMN and NR: How These NAD+ Precursors Measure Up

NR is a highly efficient precursor to NAD+, but its cousin molecule NMN is raising eyebrows as the new kid on the block.](/blogs/aging101/nmn-and-nr-how-these-nad-precursors-measure-up)

[### How to Choose an NMN Supplement

NMN supplements contain the molecule nicotinamide mononucleotide, a precursor to NAD+ that shows promise in supporting multiple aspects o...](/blogs/aging101/how-to-choose-an-nmn-supplement)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Signal and what does it do?

Signal is designed to target metabolic aging at the cellular level by elevating levels of a key metabolite, NAD+, which declines universally with age, and by activating processes involved in supporting mitochondrial health.

### How is Signal different from Basis?

The combination of ingredients in Signal is designed to promote metabolic health, whereas Basis is formulated to target overall cellular aging and DNA maintenance. As metabolic aging is tightly correlated with general aging, there is overlap in the downstream effects of the ingredients in Signal and Basis, and this is reflected in the principal ingredient in both products. As declining NAD+ levels are directly related to general aging and metabolic dysregulation, both Signal and Basis provide an NAD+ precursor molecule to target this decline–Signal contains NMN and Basis contains NR. There is some exciting, early evidence for potential tissue-specificity between the two different NAD+ precursors, as well as varied benefits, suggesting that one precursor may be more dominant in certain tissues than the other. More studies are needed to support this possibility.  
  
In addition to NAD+ precursors, both products provide ingredients that activate sirtuins–a family of enzymes that play a critical role in aging and metabolism. Signal contains Elysium’s SIRT3 Activation Complex, which activates sirtuin 3 (SIRT3), a sirtuin that resides in mitochondria and has been shown to be involved in maintaining mitochondrial health and the generation of new mitochondria. Basis, on the other hand, contains an ingredient that activates sirtuin 1 (SIRT1). Unlike SIRT3, SIRT1 resides mainly in the nucleus and plays an important role in regulating gene expression and histone modification, pointing to a more complex role for this enzyme in modulating a wide array of processes involved in cellular housekeeping, including DNA maintenance. The SIRT1 activator in Basis has also been shown to exhibit antioxidant properties.

### I’m already taking Basis, why should I take Signal as well?

There is preclinical evidence for potential tissue-specificity as well as varied benefits between the two different NAD+ precursors in Basis and Signal. More research is needed to support these findings, but taking both Basis and Signal may help ensure that NAD+ levels are elevated across a broader range of tissues, and that you’re receiving the benefits offered by each NAD+ precursor. In addition, the secondary ingredients in Signal and Basis target different processes in your cells–Signal activates an enzyme that’s involved in mitochondrial function and biogenesis whereas Basis activates an enzyme that is involved in regulating gene expression. We believe that taking both products can lead to a more comprehensive approach to targeting different aspects of aging that includes cellular and metabolic aging.

### What is SIRT3 and what are the potential benefits of activating it?

SIRT3 or sirtuin 3 is a member of the sirtuin family of enzymes that depend on NAD+ to function. SIRT3 enzymes reside in mitochondria and play an essential role in maintaining mitochondrial health and metabolic control, including glucose metabolism, cellular energy (ATP) production, fatty acid oxidation, ketone production during fasting, and amino acid cycling. Mitochondria are central hubs for metabolic reactions and produce ~95% of the cell’s energy. As we age, mitochondrial function and levels of mitochondrial sirtuins decline, leading to metabolic dysregulation. Signal is designed to activate SIRT3 and thus promote mitochondrial and metabolic health.

### What is NMN?

NMN (nicotinamide mononucleotide) is the immediate precursor to NAD+, an essential coenzyme and key metabolite found in every cell of the human body, and involved in over 500 different cellular reactions. NAD+ is synthesized by the cell through various pathways, some more complex than others. The primary pathway for NAD+ synthesis involves the conversion of nicotinamide (NAM) to NMN and subsequent conversion of NMN to NAD+. As the immediate precursor to NAD+, NMN is a highly efficient precursor, requiring the least amount of steps and energy to convert to NAD+.

### What is metabolic aging?

Metabolic aging is the imbalance or dysregulation of our metabolism as a function of aging. As we age, levels of NAD+ decline dramatically. NAD+ is a key metabolite whose levels are closely monitored by the cell in order to tune and balance its metabolic reactions. Regulating the vast number of metabolic reactions to maintain balance or homeostasis between energy production and usage is critical for cell health. In addition to the decline in NAD+ level, the activity and levels of sirtuins (NAD-dependent enzymes involved in regulating metabolism and maintaining energy homeostasis) also decline. The ingredients in Signal are designed to work synergistically to promote metabolic balance and health by elevating NAD+ levels and activating sirtuin 3.

### Can I take Signal alongside my other Elysium supplements?

All of our supplements, Basis, Matter, Format, Signal, Mosaic, and Vision are safe to be taken together. While we have identified no interactions or contraindications to date, if you have questions about a health condition or about making changes to your health routine, we recommend consulting your physician.

### What is Vision and what does it do?

Vision improves upon the AREDS 2 formula (extensively studied by the National Eye Institute for age-related eye conditions) by combining ingredients in AREDS 2 formulation with Elysium’s PIXEL complex which contains meso-zeaxanthin, zeaxanthin, lutein, and astaxanthin for complete macular support and eye longevity. Vision is designed to support everyday visual tasks (reading, screen use, and nighttime driving), performance (increased contrast sensitivity), and eye longevity (targets the age-related loss in macular pigment density).

### What is the PIXEL Complex and how does it support vision and eye health?

The PIXEL Complex contains four xanthophyll carotenoids: lutein, zeaxanthin, meso-zeaxanthin, and astaxanthin. Lutein, zeaxanthin, and meso-zeaxanthin (also known as “macular pigments”) specifically accumulate in our macula where they provide antioxidant protection and function to filter blue light to support visual performance. As we age, however, levels of these three pigments decline. Supplementation with a specific combination of these three pigments has been clinically proven to increase macular pigment density and increase contrast sensitivity and vision in glare and low-light conditions. Astaxanthin in the PIXEL Complex is also a potent antioxidant and is clinically proven to improve blood flow to the retina to support the delivery of nutrients and oxygen and support eyes during extended screen use.

### What is AREDS 2?

AREDS 2 is a nutrient formula established by the National Eye Institute’s major clinical trials on age-related eye conditions (AREDS/AREDS 2). The AREDS 2 formula replaces beta-carotene in the original AREDS formula with lutein and zeaxanthin and has been shown to be even more effective than the original formulation in slowing the progression of a common macular condition.

### How is Vision different from AREDS 2?

Vision contains the exact formulation in AREDS 2, plus meso-zeaxanthin and astaxanthin. By adding meso-zeaxanthin, Vision provides all three macular pigments (lutein, zeaxanthin, and meso-zeaxanthin) in contrast to AREDS 2, which only provides two of the three pigments (lutein and zeaxanthin). Studies show that supplementation with all three macular pigments results in a more rapid and significant increase in macular pigment density compared to supplementation with just lutein and zeaxanthin. Furthermore, astaxanthin (which is not in AREDS 2) is a potent antioxidant that has been clinically proven to increase blood flow to the retina to support the delivery of nutrients and oxygen and support eyes during extended screen use.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Mosaic and what does it do?

Mosaic is a breakthrough skin care supplement developed by Elysium Health with the advisement of Dr. Richard Granstein, chair of the Department of Dermatology at Weill Cornell Medicine for nearly 30 years and one of the world’s foremost experts in dermatology. Mosaic features the unique, clinically proven Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex, which helps to develop a “foundation” for the ideal cellular environment to counter key stressors that drive skin aging. In a single daily softgel, Mosaic combats skin aging from the innermost layers for visibly healthy, youthful skin.

### What is the Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex and how does it support more radiant, youthful skin?

Phytonutrient Carotenoid Complex is a blend of plant-based antioxidants, including carotenoids. This revolutionary new composition neutralizes free radicals, protects collagen and elastin, supports skin resilience, and helps combat signs of aging, contributing to more youthful-looking skin.

### What are carotenoids?

Carotenoids are a group of organic compounds that give many fruits and vegetables their vibrant shades of red, orange, and yellow. At a molecular level, carotenoids play a critical role as antioxidants, protecting plants from damage by light and oxygen. When we consume these foods, our bodies (and skin) can benefit from these protective properties too. Think of carotenoids as nature's colorful shield, both for the plants that contain them and for us when we include these foods in our diet. You can learn more about the skin benefits of carotenoids[here](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/carotenoids-and-skin-health).

### What is hyaluronic acid?

Hyaluronic acid (HA) is a naturally occurring molecule in the human body that plays a pivotal role in maintaining skin hydration. Found in significant amounts in the skin, eyes, and joints, HA has the unique ability to retain water, assisting in keeping tissues well lubricated. Maintaining proper barrier function is critical for skin health. Fewer natural oils, decreased cell renewal, and cumulative effects from external stressors lead to increased moisture loss as we age. As we age, our skin also produces less HA (by age 60, we have half as much HA in the epidermis compared to our 20s). Unlike topicals, which are limited to the skin surface and area of application, oral administration of HA at the dose in Mosaic increases moisture throughout the different layers of the skin, including layers not reached by most topicals.

### Is Mosaic better than topical skin care products?

Mosaic is a great complement to topical products and an essential first step in your comprehensive skin care routine. Topical products address only the skin's outermost layer and are limited to the area of application, while Mosaic works from within to support all layers of the skin across the entire body, providing a whole-body approach to skin care.

### Will Mosaic promote collagen production?

Mosaic supports healthy, radiant, youthful skin by maintaining natural collagen and elastin levels and supporting the internal structural elements in your skin to bolster its inherent defenses against environmental stressors that degrade collagen. You can learn more about collagen and skin aging[here](https://www.elysiumhealth.com/blogs/aging101/collagen-and-skin-aging).

### How quickly does Mosaic start working?

After only two weeks, your circulating carotenoid levels may be significantly higher, providing nourishment to your whole body. Proven results of increased skin moisture content and improved skin texture may be visible at 3 weeks with a Corneometer CM 825, the gold standard for assessing skin moisture content in the clinical setting. In just 4 weeks, the carotenoid levels in your skin may have increased by 15%, building up a natural reservoir of free radical-fighting phytonutrients in skin tissues to help protect collagen. With just a single daily softgel for 12 weeks, you may see improvements in skin smoothness, elasticity, dryness, and barrier function. At 16 weeks, you’ll have 31% higher carotenoid levels in your skin, leading to improved tone, brightness, radiance, and a reduction in the appearance of both deep and fine wrinkles.
